uat_scenarios.description: Administrative officer pivoting to Junior Developer
uat_scenarios.validation_focus: Career pivot into IT with minimal background

uat_scenarios.description: Software Developer deepening into ML Engineering
uat_scenarios.validation_focus: Adjacent technical upskilling with strong foundation

uat_scenarios.description: Fresh CS graduate entering software development
uat_scenarios.validation_focus: Entry-level IT path with academic foundation

uat_scenarios.description: Software developer re-entering after 3-year career break
uat_scenarios.validation_focus: Skill refresh for re-entry after career break

uat_scenarios.description: Data analyst on tight budget aiming for Data Scientist
uat_scenarios.validation_focus: Budget-constrained path; system should suggest phased approach

uat_scenarios.description: Conflicting constraints: no background, senior AI target, minimal budget
uat_scenarios.validation_focus: Failure mode: system should identify contradictions and guide gracefully

edge_cases.description: Legacy COBOL developer seeking modernisation path
edge_cases.validation_focus: Rare/legacy skills — KG may have sparse coverage; system should still produce a path

edge_cases.description: Embedded systems developer targeting IoT Engineer
edge_cases.validation_focus: Specialised niche — limited course coverage expected; test graceful fallback

edge_cases.description: International IT professional entering Singapore market
edge_cases.validation_focus: International credentials — KG should still match skills; funding flag expected

edge_cases.description: Freelance developer with irregular work history
edge_cases.validation_focus: Fragmented CV — NER must handle project-based descriptions

edge_cases.description: Ambiguous CV with vague skill descriptions
edge_cases.validation_focus: Minimal/vague CV — system must request clarification and use reasonable defaults
edge_cases.notes: CV text example: 'Worked on data projects and maintained systems. Comfortable with computers and reporting tools.'
